controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.evidence_summary: The Dockerfile declares the runtime image but no non-root USER directive; production runtime evidence remains unresolved.
manual_evidence_items: Container hardening exception or remediation ticket
controls.confidence_rationale: Repository evidence supports the Docker hardening finding, but production runtime configuration was not available.
controls.evidence_quality_rationale: Evidence is partial because source evidence shows a configuration gap and manual runtime evidence is required to close the reviewer concern.

findings.title: Container image does not declare a non-root runtime user
findings.description: The Dockerfile starts from a Node image and does not switch to a non-root user.

evidence.assessment: No USER directive appears in the Dockerfile.

findings.gap: Runtime least privilege is not enforced in repository configuration.
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit non-root USER directive or attach production runtime evidence proving non-root execution.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.evidence_summary: CI runs npm audit, but no latest scan export or remediation queue is included.
manual_evidence_items: Risk acceptance records for unresolved findings
controls.confidence_rationale: CI configuration shows automated dependency scanning, but scan results and remediation tracking are outside the repository.
controls.evidence_quality_rationale: Evidence is partial because the workflow proves a scan command exists but not that vulnerabilities are reviewed and remediated.
recommendations: Attach scan results and remediation tracking evidence
